text: A woman with a towel on her head is brushing her teeth.
A shirtless male is outside preparing to throw a football.
Many cows laying down in a dirt parking lot.
The food is ready to be eaten on the table.
A gray, brown and black dog holds his nose near a piece of food on the floor.
Several baked goods are displayed in a market.
A white old fashioned stove next to a wooden table.
A young man on a snow board in the snow.
A black-and-white photo of the body of water in people in boats.
A group of kids looking at a volcano cake.
